headline: Introducing Autodesk for Small Business for the small businesses shaping Design and Make
summary: Today, Autodesk is launching Autodesk for Small Business to unlock growth for the many small teams and entrepreneurs who depend on its technology.

headline: Michael Baker International Named to Autodesk Digital Twin Solution Provider Program
summary: Michael Baker International, a global leader in engineering, consulting and digital solutions, today announced that the firm has been named to the Autodesk Digital Twin Solution Provider Program, a selective global partner program that recognizes organizations with proven expertise in delivering, scaling and sustaining digital twin solutions using Autodesk Tandem.

raw.headline: Michael Baker International Named to Autodesk Digital Twin Solution Provider Program

headline: Autodesk extends invitation to join financial results conference call
summary: Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADSK) today announced it will share its first quarter fiscal 2027 financial results conference call via its website on Thursday, May 28, 2026, at 2 p.m. Pacific Time (PT). Join the live webcast call here: autodesk.com/investors. An audio replay of the webcast will be available after 5 p.m. PT at autodesk.com/investors.
